---
title: "redactor.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\redactor.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 6
logic_score: 8.05
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.66
---

## Intent
The `redactor.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on Redactor, __new__, _initialize, redact, redact_shorthand. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Redactor, __new__, _initialize, redact, redact_shorthand. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [src.tools.vault](file://src.tools.vault)

### Exports
- `Redactor`
- `__new__`
- `_initialize`
- `redact`
- `redact_shorthand`
